name: light-cleanup-of-six-bot-bugs-20260408-0250
idea: light cleanup of six bot bugs — see notes

overrides.note:
ANSWERS TO PLAN QUESTIONS — full bug list:

(1) DM context bug — src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:246-275
Only the guild branch attaches replied_to/recent_messages; the DM branch is missing both. Fix: mirror the guild branch's reply/history fetch into the DM branch (DMChannel supports .history() the same way), and surface the replied_to anchor more loudly to the model so it knows which prior message the user is pointing at.

(2) Crash on follow-up tweet — admin_chat_cog.py:333
discord.errors.DiscordServerError (503 from Discord's edge) raised inside message.channel.send bubbled to the cog catch-all at lines 348-350 which then echoed the raw exception text into the chat. Fix: small retry (1-2 retries with short backoff) on discord.HTTPException 5xx around the per-part channel.send, and stop pasting raw exception strings — log with exc_info, send neutral user copy.

(3) Zapier IG/TikTok/YouTube webhooks return 404 — they're dead.
User has approved REMOVING these destinations entirely from src/features/sharing/subfeatures/social_poster.py and any callsites/tools that reference them. Twitter stays. Be thorough about removing references — don't leave dead code.

(4) share_to_social blows up on ForumChannel — src/features/admin_chat/tools.py:1022
ForumChannel has no fetch_message — needs to resolve to the thread first (ForumChannel posts ARE threads — get the thread via guild.get_thread / channel.get_thread / bot.fetch_channel before calling fetch_message).

(5) query_table — src/features/admin_chat/tools.py:1536
Referencing columns that don't exist (discord_messages.author_name, shared_posts.created_at). Verify the actual schema and either fix the tool description / column-mapping logic or update what the agent is told about column names.

(6) src/common/storage_handler.py:143
'deque mutated during iteration' race when serialising the message batch to Supabase — fix by taking a snapshot/copy of the deque before iterating/serialising.

ANSWERS TO META QUESTIONS:
- One bundled commit is fine (do not need six separate commits).
- Do not skip any bugs.
- Leave the unrelated working-tree changes (summariser.py, scripts/) alone.
- Notes are now provided here; no separate file.

CRITICAL: success criteria MUST explicitly verify that bugs (1) DM context and (2) crash-on-follow-up-tweet would be fully solved by the proposed changes.
